name: Heng Hup Holdings Limited
summary: Heng Hup Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a scrap ferrous metal trader in Malaysia and internationally. It purchases scrap ferrous metals from various sources, and processes and sells them to steel mills. The company trades in scrap ferrous metals, used batteries, waste paper, and other scraps. Its customers for used batteries and waste paper are lead smelting plants and paper mills. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shah Alam, Malaysia. Heng Hup Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of 5S Holdings (BVI) Limited.
